LSTAT2340 - Analyse de données transcriptomique : Single-cell RNA-SEQ

Jerome Ambroise - UCL - IREC - CTMA

Februar 22, 2021,13:31

Dans le document, ci dessous, nous allons analyser des données single-cell RNA-SEQ

library(Seurat)
library(scater)
library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(WriteXLS)
adams <- readRDS( '1-data/data.combined.selected.rds')
DefaultAssay(adams) <- "RNA"
adams
## An object of class Seurat 
## 42628 features across 1046 samples within 1 assay 
## Active assay: RNA (42628 features, 2000 variable features)
##  2 dimensional reductions calculated: pca, umap

1 Reduction de dimension

PCA : Principal Component analysis.

UMAP nonlinear dimensionality-reduction technique, uniform manifold approximation and projection (UMAP)

DimPlot(adams, reduction = "umap")

DimPlot(adams, reduction = "pca")

2 Calcul des gènes modulés

adams
## An object of class Seurat 
## 42628 features across 1046 samples within 1 assay 
## Active assay: RNA (42628 features, 2000 variable features)
##  2 dimensional reductions calculated: pca, umap
exprs <- GetAssayData(object = adams, slot = 'data')
dim(exprs)
## [1] 42628  1046
dim(adams@meta.data)
## [1] 1046    9
head(adams@meta.data)
##                       orig.ident nCount_RNA nFeature_RNA percent.mt
## 001C_CATTCGCCACTTAAGC      Adams       1179          794  0.6785411
## 001C_CCTCTGACAAGTCTGT      Adams       3658         1995  2.0503007
## 001C_CTCTAATAGGAATGGA      Adams       4157         2275  3.4640366
## 001C_GCCTCTAAGAGTAAGG      Adams       1570         1123  3.5668790
## 001C_TAAACCGAGAGAGCTC      Adams       1919         1213  0.3647733
## 001C_TCATTTGGTTATCGGT      Adams       4135         2047  3.8452237
##                       CellType_Category Manuscript_Identity
## 001C_CATTCGCCACTTAAGC        Epithelial                Club
## 001C_CCTCTGACAAGTCTGT        Epithelial               Basal
## 001C_CTCTAATAGGAATGGA        Epithelial               Basal
## 001C_GCCTCTAAGAGTAAGG        Epithelial               Basal
## 001C_TAAACCGAGAGAGCTC        Epithelial                Club
## 001C_TCATTTGGTTATCGGT        Epithelial               Basal
##                       Subclass_Cell_Identity Disease_Identity Subject_Identity
## 001C_CATTCGCCACTTAAGC                   Club          Control             001C
## 001C_CCTCTGACAAGTCTGT                  Basal          Control             001C
## 001C_CTCTAATAGGAATGGA                  Basal          Control             001C
## 001C_GCCTCTAAGAGTAAGG                  Basal          Control             001C
## 001C_TAAACCGAGAGAGCTC                   Club          Control             001C
## 001C_TCATTTGGTTATCGGT                  Basal          Control             001C
table(adams$Manuscript_Identity)
## 
## Aberrant_Basaloid             Basal          Ciliated              Club 
##                20               117               434               342 
##            Goblet 
##               133
table(adams$Disease_Identity)
## 
## Control    COPD     IPF 
##     183     223     640
adams@meta.data$celltype.group <- paste(adams$Manuscript_Identity, adams$Disease_Identity, sep = "_")

Idents(adams) <- adams$celltype.group
table(Idents(adams))
## 
##           Club_Control          Basal_Control       Ciliated_Control 
##                     57                     19                     91 
##               Club_IPF           Ciliated_IPF             Goblet_IPF 
##                    167                    282                     90 
##              Basal_IPF  Aberrant_Basaloid_IPF              Club_COPD 
##                     83                     18                    118 
##          Ciliated_COPD             Basal_COPD         Goblet_Control 
##                     61                     15                     16 
##            Goblet_COPD Aberrant_Basaloid_COPD 
##                     27                      2
markers.COPD.Basal <- FindMarkers(adams,ident.2 = 'Ciliated_Control' ,ident.1 = 'Ciliated_COPD',logfc.threshold = 0.01)
markers.COPD.Basal <- tibble(data.frame(gene=rownames(markers.COPD.Basal),markers.COPD.Basal))
markers.COPD.Basal <- markers.COPD.Basal %>% select(gene,avg_logFC,p_val,p_val_adj)
head(markers.COPD.Basal)
## # A tibble: 6 x 4
##   gene            avg_logFC    p_val   p_val_adj
##   <chr>               <dbl>    <dbl>       <dbl>
## 1 FTL                -0.911 1.83e-11 0.000000779
## 2 ZBTB16              1.01  1.65e- 7 0.00702    
## 3 SCHLAP1            -0.718 1.01e- 5 0.431      
## 4 ENSG00000197180    -0.711 3.27e- 5 1          
## 5 RTN4               -0.612 1.16e- 4 1          
## 6 PCCA                0.629 1.26e- 4 1

3 Illustration des résultats

Idents(adams) <- adams$Manuscript_Identity
VlnPlot(adams, features = c("FTL"),  split.by= "Disease_Identity")
## The default behaviour of split.by has changed.
## Separate violin plots are now plotted side-by-side.
## To restore the old behaviour of a single split violin,
## set split.plot = TRUE.
